construct_verdict_reason: All three items directly measure economic wellbeing perception across personal, national, and intergenerational dimensions as described in the construct definition.

items.reason: Directly measures satisfaction with the country's current economic situation, capturing the societal economic evaluation component of the construct.
Directly measures personal satisfaction with one's own current economic situation, capturing the individual economic evaluation component of the construct.

Directly measures perceived intergenerational economic mobility by comparing current living standards to parents' living standards at the same age, capturing the intergenerational comparison component of the construct.
